note: Source info for installed skills. Used to update or reinstall on a new machine.

git_cloned.name: gstack
git_cloned.note: Bundle repo — contains browse, gstack-upgrade, plan-ceo-review, plan-eng-review, qa, retro, review, setup-browser-cookies, ship as sub-dirs. On new machine: clone this one repo only; skip standalone copies of those 9.

claudekit_skills.note: Author: claudekit (ckm: prefix), MIT licensed. Source URL unknown (copied from another laptop). Files tracked in this repo.

gstack_standalone_copies.note: Standalone copies of skills already inside skills/gstack/ bundle. Kept for compatibility. On new machine, these come free when cloning gstack.

user_created.note: Created by user — not from any public repo.

third_party_no_git_source.note: Known author but no git history on this machine. Files tracked in this repo.

unknown_source.note: No author metadata, no git history. Likely Claude Code built-ins or copied from another laptop. Files tracked in this repo.
